news.t: Hedgeye Capital Allocation ETF (HECA) and Hedgeye Quality Growth ETF (HGRO) Now Available Through LPL Financial
Hedgeye Asset Management Launches the Hedgeye Capital Allocation ETF (HECA) Managed by Veteran PM David Salem

overview.description: The Hedgeye Capital Allocation ETF (HECA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is actively managed, seeking long-term capital appreciation through its proprietary quantitative macroeconomic model. Investments in equities, fixed income, commodities, and currencies may be obtained through other ETFs HECA was launched on Jul 1, 2025 and is issued by Hedgeye.
